name: Vegetable Briyani
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Steamed Vegetables (e.g., green peas, beans, carrots, cauliflower)
2 tbsp Cashew Nuts or Slivered Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the Basmati rice under cold water and soak it for 30 minutes. Drain well.
2. Melt 1 1/2 tbsp ghee in a skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until golden brown. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, melt the remaining ghee and add the rinsed Basmati rice. Fry for a few minutes until it lightly coats the rice grains.
4. Add all the spices (turmeric powder, cinnamon powder, clove powder, nutmeg powder, chilli powder, coriander powder) and mix well to coat the rice evenly.
5. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. In an oven-safe dish or pan, place the cooked rice mixture and add salt and 1 1/2 cups of water. Stir gently.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until the rice is fully cooked and absorbs the moisture.
8. Add the steamed vegetables and chopped onions with raisins and cashew nuts to the rice dish. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
9. Turn off the heat and serve hot.
